_comment: Named-waypoint teach table for the Isaac sim (robot_target=sim|both). Copy to sim_named_poses.json, replace the PLACEHOLDER positions with measured TCP poses, and set SIM_NAMED_POSES_FILE=/abs/path/to/sim_named_poses.json (or paste the object into SIM_NAMED_POSES). Positions are [x,y,z] in METRES in the robot BASE frame; orientation_quat is [w,x,y,z] ([0,1,0,0] = tool pointing straight down). Per entry you may instead use {"type":"move_joint","params":{"joints":[j1..j6,gL,gR]}} (8 DOF, gripper-open = -0.006/0.006). inspect_* are only needed once the sim inspection camera lands; the count follows INSPECTION_ANGLES.
